title: 8 Natural Herbal Creams to Treat Enlarged Spleen in Cirrhosis Patients
description: Zingiber officinale creams contain the active compound gingerol, which has anti-inflammatory properties. This helps to reduce swelling and pain in the spleen. The creams also contain other constituents like zingiberene and bisabolol, which have antimicrobial and antioxidant effects.  To use Zingiber officinale creams for an enlarged spleen, apply a thin layer to the affected area 2-3 times a day.
